caption: A woman with short black hair and glasses is speaking against a plain dark background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved top featuring floral embroidery around the neckline and a simple dark necklace. In the sequence of images, she is captured mid-speech, her mouth open as she talks. She uses her hands to gesture for emphasis, bringing her right hand across her chest and moving it slightly as she speaks. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the lower-left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". The lighting is consistent across all frames, focusing on the woman, while her posture remains relatively stable as she engages in a presentation or lecture.
